auth.label: Events API Bearer Token
auth.description: 1Password Events Reporting bearer token sent with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create an Events Reporting integration in 1Password and copy its bearer token.

extraFields.label: Events API Server URL
extraFields.description: The Events API Server URL shown when you create the 1Password Events Reporting integration.

actions.name: list_audit_events
actions.description: List 1Password audit events using the official cursor-based Events API.

cursor.description: Cursor from a previous 1Password Events API response.

startTime.description: Start time for a reset cursor request.

endTime.description: End time for a reset cursor request.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return, from 1 to 1000.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for reading a 1Password Events API cursor stream.

cursor.description: Cursor to continue reading the event stream.

hasMore.description: Whether 1Password reports more events are available for this cursor.

items.description: One raw event object returned by 1Password.

raw.description: The raw 1Password Events API response object.

outputSchema.description: A normalized 1Password Events API stream response.
